description: Ternary where the true branch interpolates a tainted identifier. The decomposed CFG gives each branch a Seq node; the true branch has uses=[name] and inherits the source taint. The phi at the join is the union of the tainted branch and the literal fallback, which is still tainted — res.send must fire.

expected.notes: req.query.name flows into the true branch of the ternary; phi at the join preserves the taint; res.send(out) must fire.
